design_principles.fusion: Sports Data x Neo-Brutalism. Raw numbers meet glowing accents.
design_principles.interaction: Tactile cards. Pressing a prediction button should feel like punching a ticket.
design_principles.hierarchy: Score > Status > Team Names. The data that changes most often gets the brightest color.
design_principles.density: High density for rankings, spacious for prediction inputs.

typography.instructions: Use expo-font to load 'Barlow Condensed' for all headers/scores and 'Manrope' for UI text. Fallback to system sans-serif.

images.description: Atmospheric foggy stadium night - Use as subtle overlay background with low opacity
Dynamic player silhouette - Use for empty states or promo cards

assets.icons: Use @expo/vector-icons (Ionicons or MaterialCommunityIcons) for all UI icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. USE StyleSheet.create() for all styling. Do not use Tailwind/NativeWind unless explicitly configured.
2. REACT NATIVE SPECIFIC: Use <View>, <Text>, <TouchableOpacity>, <FlatList>, <ScrollView>. NO HTML tags (div, span).
4. THEME: Implement a ThemeContext to handle the Dark/Light toggle. Default to DARK.
5. PREDICTION INPUTS: For the 11 matches, use a horizontal scroll or segmented control for the market types (1X2, Goal/NoGoal). Don't show all inputs at once; keep it clean.
6. LIVE SCORE: Use a polling mechanism (setInterval) to fetch scores every 30-60s.
7. HEADER: Custom header component with 'Barlow Condensed' font.
8. DATA-TESTID: Add 'testID' prop to all interactables (React Native uses 'testID' not 'data-testid').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states (Pressable pressed), transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
